text:
ale         2008-04-22 07:42:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/enigmail-thunderbird Makefile 
  Log:
  Use gcc 3.4 to build enigmail for thunderbird on amd64 (and FreeBSD >= 7).
  This should fix the enigmail crash.
  
  PR:             ports/117285
  Submitted by:   delphij
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.44      +7 -1      ports/mail/enigmail-thunderbird/Makefile
